pattern_report: 18-24 audiences drive a 46% stronger performance score versus baseline, with 13% lower CVR and 37% lower CPA across 1 campaigns.
18-25 audiences drive a 32% stronger performance score versus baseline, with 4% lower CVR and 38% lower CPA across 2 campaigns.
18-30 audiences drive a 19% stronger performance score versus baseline, with 4% higher CVR and 40% lower CPA across 1 campaigns.
Ugc_Video creatives deliver a 46% stronger performance score, 13% lower CVR, and 37% lower CPA while sustaining 3.5% CTR across 1 campaigns.
Video creatives deliver a 32% stronger performance score, 4% lower CVR, and 38% lower CPA while sustaining 3.5% CTR across 2 campaigns.
Image creatives deliver a 19% stronger performance score, 4% higher CVR, and 40% lower CPA while sustaining 3.5% CTR across 1 campaigns.
cmp_002_google_search_saas_demo is overspending relative to history, with CPA at 67.71 on 6500.00 spend while only converting at 4.2%.
TikTok campaigns average 3.5% CTR and 3.3% CVR, driving a 46% stronger score than the portfolio average.
Meta campaigns average 3.5% CTR and 4.0% CVR, driving a 19% stronger score than the portfolio average.
Google Ads campaigns average 2.6% CTR and 4.2% CVR, driving a 64% weaker score than the portfolio average.
The scale winners cluster contains 1 campaigns with 3.3% average CVR and 24.29 CPA.
The efficient converters cluster contains 1 campaigns with 4.0% average CVR and 23.21 CPA.
The at risk cluster contains 1 campaigns with 4.2% average CVR and 67.71 CPA.
